title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deployment and management of databases at scale, including SQL and NoSQL best practices for data storage and querying. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with community support across multiple platforms.
